title: Russian-Style Sick Day Soup
description: A comforting, easy-to-make soup perfect for a day when you're not feeling well. The Russian twist adds a delicious and soothing flavor.
instructions: Chop the onion, potatoes, and dill.
Heat the bacon in a large pot over medium heat until crispy.
Remove the bacon and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and sauté until softened.
Add the chopped potatoes, diced tomatoes, and chicken broth to the pot.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 15-20 minutes.
Stir in sour cream (if using) and season with salt and pepper.
Return the crispy bacon to the pot (if using) and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped fresh dill (if desired).
Serve hot, garnished with additional sour cream and dill if desired.
